label.description: Label indicating the stimulus type presented in the trial

values.NaturalVideo: Video sampled from films or the Sport-1M dataset
values.NaturalImages: ODD stimuli. Sequence of natural images from ImageNet presented 15 frames interleave with 12-18 frames of gray screen.
values.Gabor: ODD stimuli. Sequence of spatiotemporal drifting Gabor patches (8 possible directions, 3 spacial frequencies, 3 temporal frequencies), lasting 25 frames each
values.PinkNoise: ODD stimuli. Sequence of directional pink noise with spatial orientation perpendicular to the motion direction, lasting 27 frames each
values.RandomDots: ODD stimuli. Sequence of random dots kinematogram (8 possible trajectories with 2 possible coherences and 2 velocities), lasting 60 frames each
values.GaussianDot: ODD stimuli. Sequence of a single Gaussian blob (105 locations, 2 color intensities), lasting 9 frames each

ID.description: Unique video identifier assigned by similarity grouping

trial.description: Trial identifier within the recording. Interger number. They do not match the trials presentation order.

trial_type.description: Phase of the recording in which the trial occurs

values.train: First phase. Trials for trainng. Only NaturalVideo. No video repetition.
values.oracle: Second phase. Trials for training. Only NaturalVideo. Videos repeated 10 times.
values.live_test_main: Third phase. Trials for testing. Only NaturalVideo. Videos repeated 10 times.
values.live_test_bonus: Fourth phase. Trials for testing. Trials from one ODD label. Videos repeated 10 times.
values.final_test_main: Fifth phase. Trials for testing. Only NaturalVideo. Videos repeated 10 times.
values.final_test_bonus: Sixth phase. Trials for testing. Trials from two ODD labels. Videos repeated 10 times.

valid_frames.description: Number of valid frames in the trial (minimum between video and response valid frames)

valid_trial.description: Boolean indicating whether the trial is valid (e.g. no bad segments)

valid_frames_video.description: Number of valid frames in the video for this trial (not NaN)

valid_frames_response.description: Number of valid frames in the neural response data for this trial (not NaN)

valid_response.description: Boolean indicating whether the neural response is valid (e.g., not all zero or NaN)
